	- Vault._processWithdraw(address,address,uint256) (contracts/Vault.sol#156-164)
	- Vault.calcReward(address,address) (contracts/Vault.sol#138-147)

	- Vault.totalWeight (contracts/Vault.sol#26)

	- _deposit(synth,member,amount) (contracts/Vault.sol#84)

	- _deposit(synth,member,amount) (contracts/Vault.sol#84)
		- totalWeight += _weight (contracts/Vault.sol#94)
